title: Executive Officer
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This Registry Executive Officer position involves coordinating student admission and recruitment activities by liaising with Schools, Departments, and external stakeholders, organizing promotion events for prospective students, and managing recruitment-related data and reporting. The role requires a bachelor's degree with at least 3 years of relevant work experience, ideally in student recruitment and event organization, along with proficiency in English and Chinese (Cantonese and Putonghua) and strong computer literacy including Chinese word processing. The candidate should provide administrative support across all Registry functions, including serving as secretary to committees and workgroups. This is a pivotal administrative position within the university's student-facing operations, essential to supporting the institution's enrollment and admissions processes.

title: 中文系
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This part-time research assistant position supports a Research Grants Council-funded project on the reception and reinterpretation of Qu Yuan and the *Chu ci* during the Republican period. The role involves collecting and organizing research materials, writing summaries and research compendiums, and preparing academic papers and publications. Applicants must hold a master's degree in Chinese or a related field and demonstrate strong capabilities in handling and writing academic literature in both Chinese and English, along with careful attention to detail and proactive work habits. Prior familiarity with the relevant research area is preferred.

title: Associate Vice-President (Quality Assurance)
description: Associate Vice-President (Quality Assurance). Please visit the application link for full details.

title: Director
description: The position requires a director to lead the Information Technology Services Centre with extensive managerial experience in higher education administration, ideally gained from a similar role in local or international institutions. Candidates must hold a postgraduate qualification, with a doctorate preferred, and demonstrate at least five years of relevant senior-level administrative experience. Fluency in both English and Chinese, in written and spoken forms, is essential. This role is distinctive in requiring both advanced academic credentials and proven leadership experience specifically within higher education IT service environments.

title: Clinic Manager cum Senior Lecturer
department: S.K. Yee School of Health Sciences
description: This combined clinical and academic role involves establishing and expanding a physiotherapy service at a practice clinic while delivering patient care and supervising undergraduate physiotherapy students. The position requires a Master's degree in physiotherapy or related field, current registration and practicing certificate as a physiotherapist in Hong Kong, and at least 5 years of professional experience at senior level. Key responsibilities include clinical service delivery, clinical education, research facilitation, and institutional development. The role is distinctive in its dual emphasis on clinical practice expansion and academic teaching within an integrated education centre.

title: [Full-time / Part-time] Associate Professors / Assistant Professors / Senior Lecturers
department: School of Business and Hospitality Management
description: The position requires teaching across multiple subject areas at sub-degree through postgraduate levels, alongside scholarly research and administrative duties in business and hospitality management. Candidates for Assistant Professor must hold a PhD in a relevant discipline plus relevant teaching or professional experience, with preference for those demonstrating strong undergraduate/postgraduate teaching records, programme management expertise, and proven research output. Senior Lecturer applicants require a Master's degree and professional membership, along with a minimum of three years of supervisory or managerial industry experience. Strong English proficiency is essential, with Chinese language skills preferred.

title: Research Professor
description: This role requires leading the research and scholarly activities of a school while producing high-impact international research and fostering a strong research culture. The successful candidate must hold a PhD, have substantial professorial-level research experience with significant publications, and demonstrate a track record of securing major external grants and recognized research excellence. Key responsibilities include mentoring junior researchers and faculty, initiating collaborations with local and international institutions, and advising on academic program quality and staff performance. The position demands strong management and interpersonal skills alongside an established network in industry and education sectors.

title: Assistant Professors/ Senior Lecturers/ Lecturers
department: S.K. Yee School of Health Sciences
description: The position involves teaching and research in pharmaceutical dispensing within health sciences at the lecturer, senior lecturer, or assistant professor level. Candidates must hold a Master's degree in a relevant discipline, with strong preference for those possessing a Doctoral degree and prior experience teaching in tertiary programmes. Fluency in both English and Chinese is essential. The role emphasises expertise in pharmaceutical dispensing and commitment to academic development.

title: [Full-time/ Part-time] Assistant Professor/ Lecturer
department: Yam Pak Charitable Foundation School of Computing and Information Sciences
description: This position requires a computing and information sciences academic to deliver teaching across undergraduate and postgraduate programmes while contributing to curriculum development and review. The role demands a strong research focus, with expectation of publications in top-tier journals, alongside engagement in consultancy and scholarly activities. Additional academic and administrative responsibilities may be assigned by the Dean as needed.

title: Fieldwork Coordinator cum Lecturer/ Senior Lecturer
department: Felizberta Lo Padilla Tong School of Social Sciences
description: The appointee will be responsible (i) to co-ordinate fieldwork placement; (ii) to liaise with agency for fieldwork places; (iii) to convene fieldwork co-ordination other related meetings; and (iv) to perform teaching and related duties.

title: [Full-time/Part-time] Assistant Professors / Senior Lecturers / Lecturers
department: Felizberta Lo Padilla Tong School of Social Sciences
description: This position invites applications for academic roles (Assistant Professor, Senior Lecturer, or Lecturer level) within a social sciences school. Candidates must hold a Master's degree in a relevant discipline and demonstrate teaching or professional experience, though priority will be given to those with doctoral qualifications and evidence of teaching at degree level or strong research records. Professional registration in Hong Kong or internationally is a mandatory requirement for the specific discipline.

title: [Full-time/Part-time] Professors / Associate Professors
department: Felizberta Lo Padilla Tong School of Social Sciences
description: The position involves teaching responsibilities across degree and sub-degree level programmes within the School of Social Sciences. Candidates must hold a doctoral degree in a relevant discipline and demonstrate substantial teaching or professional experience, with preference given to those with degree-level teaching experience or a strong research record. Professional registration in Hong Kong or an equivalent overseas jurisdiction is a mandatory requirement for the specific discipline. This is a full-time or part-time appointment at either Professor or Associate Professor level.

title: Part-time Research Assistant
description: This part-time research assistant role supports a humanities research project with responsibilities spanning administrative coordination, data collection and preprocessing, participant recruitment, data annotation, dataset management, and report preparation. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in a humanities field and demonstrate solid research experience alongside strong communication and teamwork capabilities. Bilingual proficiency in Chinese and English, both written and spoken, is essential, along with competent computer skills. The position values collaborative work ethic and the ability to manage multiple research support tasks efficiently.

title: Research Assistant
description: This Research Assistant position supports a five-year psychosocial study examining service outcomes for students with special educational needs, involving literature review, interview coordination and analysis, data analysis, report compilation, and administrative support. Candidates must hold a bachelor's degree or higher in education, applied research, psychology, statistics, or social work, with demonstrated experience in quantitative and/or qualitative research methods. The role requires proficiency in conducting in-depth interviews and analyzing quantitative data, alongside strong independent work capabilities, attention to detail, and analytical thinking. Fluency in English and Chinese, combined with excellent communication skills, is essential.

title: Senior Research Associate
department: School of Computing and Information Sciences
description: This role is a Senior Research Associate within a construction technology project focused on monitoring and controlling tower cranes through Digital Twin AI and IoT systems. Key responsibilities include conducting interviews and focus groups, collecting and analyzing quantitative data, and developing operational manuals and training materials. Candidates should hold at least a Bachelor's degree (Master's/MPhil preferred) in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields, with demonstrated experience in statistical data analysis, strong independent working ability, and excellent communication and writing skills; prior publication experience is advantageous.

title: Research Assistant
department: S School of Computing and Information Sciences
description: This Research Assistant position involves collecting and analyzing data to evaluate wet electrostatic precipitator performance and recommend improvements, while contributing to peer-reviewed publications and conference presentations. The role requires close collaboration with a project lead and team members to achieve research objectives, along with mentoring responsibilities for undergraduate and graduate students. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, with demonstrated experience in statistical data analysis, independent work capability, and strong communication and writing skills. Prior publication experience is preferred.

title: Part-time Senior Research Assistant
department: Ip Ying To Lee Yu Yee School of Humanities and Languages
description: This part-time senior research assistant position involves comprehensive support for a research project, including data collection and preprocessing, statistical analysis, trend projection, data management, and report preparation. Candidates must hold a Master's degree, preferably interdisciplinary, with demonstrated research experience and a publication record. The role requires strong communication skills, proficiency in English and computer applications, and flexibility to work across diverse project materials.

title: Part-time Research Assistant
department: Rita Tong Liu School of Business and Hospitality Management
description: Three part-time research assistants will be appointed across distinct disciplinary areas—Accounting & Finance, Entrepreneurship & Management, and Hotel & Tourism & Marketing—each supporting research projects through literature reviews, data collection and analysis, database management, and report preparation. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree or higher with demonstrated research experience and proficiency in statistical and database tools such as SPSS, SQL, and MS Access. Strong communication skills, bilingual competency in English and Chinese (including Putonghua), and solid computer literacy are essential, alongside a collaborative attitude and positive work approach.
